---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── 전체 래퍼 ── */
.home-wrap {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}

/* ── 히어로 배너 ── */
.hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a2f 0%, #2e5441 60%, #3a6b52 100%);
  color: #f5f0e8;
  padding: 1.2rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.hero-left .hero-title {
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 0 0 0.2rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}
.hero-left .hero-title span { color: #d4a017; }
.hero-left .hero-sub {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  opacity: 0.82;
  margin: 0;
}
.hero-right .hero-motto {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-style: italic;
  border-left: 3px solid #d4a017;
  padding-left: 0.8rem;
  opacity: 0.88;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ── 메인 2열 ── */
.main-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 300px 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: start;
}

/* ── 왼쪽: 프로필 + 타임라인 ── */
.left-col {
  background: #fafafa;
  border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.2rem;
}
.profile-img {
  width: 80px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}
.profile-name {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e3a2f;
  margin: 0 0 0.1rem;
}
.profile-title {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #666;
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem;
}
.profile-desc {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
  padding-bottom: 0.8rem;
}
.tl-title {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e3a2f;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}
.tl-item {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  align-items: baseline;
}
.tl-year {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #d4a017;
  min-width: 72px;
}
.tl-content {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #555;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* ── 오른쪽: 섹션 카드 ── */
.right-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 0.8rem;
}
.sec-card {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 9px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  color: inherit !important;
  display: block;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  background: #fff;
  border-top: 3px solid #1e3a2f;
}
.sec-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(30,58,47,0.12);
  border-top-color: #d4a017;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}
.sec-card .icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
.sec-card .card-title {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e3a2f;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.sec-card .card-desc {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #777;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

/* ── 반응형 ── */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .hero { flex-direction: column; }
  .main-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .right-col { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
</style>

<div class="home-wrap">

  <!-- 히어로 배너 -->
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-title">권세혁 교수의 <span>통계 책방</span></div>
      <div class="hero-sub">한남대학교 통계학과 명예교수 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 통계・데이터 사이언스 강의노트</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="hero-motto">
        세상 모든 사람이 통계를 사랑하는 그 날까지<br>
        put a ding in the universe &nbsp;·&nbsp; pay forward
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 메인 2열 -->
  <div class="main-row">

    <!-- 왼쪽: 프로필 + 타임라인 -->
    <div class="left-col">
      <img class="profile-img" src="myself.png" alt="권세혁 교수">
      <div class="profile-name">권세혁</div>
      <div class="profile-title">한남대학교 통계학과 명예교수</div>
      <div class="profile-desc">
        1995년부터 통계학 강의노트를 데이터 사이언스 중심으로 구성.<br>
        MLDL 개념부터는 AI와 공동 집필 중ing.
      </div>
      <div class="tl-title">학력 &amp; 경력</div>
      <div class="tl-item">
        <span class="tl-year">1979–1985</span>
        <span class="tl-content">성균관대 통계학 학·석사</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item">
        <span class="tl-year">1986–1992</span>
        <span class="tl-content">NC State Univ. 통계학 박사</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item">
        <span class="tl-year">1993–1995</span>
        <span class="tl-content">전자통신연구원 선임연구원</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item">
        <span class="tl-year">1995–2026</span>
        <span class="tl-content">한남대학교 통계학과 교수</span>
      </div>
      <div class="tl-item">
        <span class="tl-year">2026–현재</span>
        <span class="tl-content" style="font-weight:600;color:#1e3a2f;">한남대학교 명예교수</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 오른쪽: 섹션 카드 -->
    <div class="right-col">
      <a class="sec-card" href="stat_assay/index.qmd">
        <div class="icon">📝</div>
        <div class="card-title">통계 이야기</div>
        <div class="card-desc">숫자 뒤에 숨은 이야기, 통계를 쉽게 풀어내는 에세이</div>
      </a>
      <a class="sec-card" href="notes/math_stat/index.qmd">
        <div class="icon">📐</div>
        <div class="card-title">기초수학 · 수리통계 · 조사방법</div>
        <div class="card-desc">함수·행렬·확률·추정·가설검정·표본설계</div>
      </a>
      <a class="sec-card" href="notes/intro_stat/index.qmd">
        <div class="icon">📊</div>
        <div class="card-title">기초통계 · 회귀 · 다변량분석</div>
        <div class="card-desc">기술통계·분산분석·회귀분석·PCA·군집분석</div>
      </a>
      <a class="sec-card" href="notes/mldl_intro/index.qmd">
        <div class="icon">🤖</div>
        <div class="card-title">머신러닝 · 딥러닝</div>
        <div class="card-desc">지도·비지도학습, 예측·분류, 트리·딥러닝</div>
      </a>
      <a class="sec-card" href="notes/inference_xai/index.qmd">
        <div class="icon">🧠</div>
        <div class="card-title">AI · 감성분석</div>
        <div class="card-desc">인과추론, 설명가능 AI, 텍스트 감성분석</div>
      </a>
      <a class="sec-card" href="consult.qmd">
        <div class="icon">💬</div>
        <div class="card-title">통계 상담</div>
        <div class="card-desc">논문·프로젝트 통계 분석 방법론 상담</div>
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
